socketedItems.secDescrText: Attacks enemies with a melee strike, applying a debuff for a short duration. Maximum 9 Summoned Normal Sentinels of Dominance

hybrid.secDescrText: This spell causes one of your existing Sentinels of Dominance to Ascend, becoming more powerful, gaining new attacks, and overriding its duration, while maintaining its monster modifiers and other bonuses, including from support gems. If you cannot have more Ascended Sentinels of Dominance, an existing one will be refreshed instead.
